programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep111: Shark Nation
programme.desc: There's no doubt sharks have an image problem. And they're certainly in trouble globally. The population of some species has declined by more than 90% due to over fishing. But there's still one place in the world where sharks thrive – the Bahamas. Sharks not only prosper there, they are highly protected. It’s illegal to kill them.

programme.title: Let's Take It Outside Ep106: Shark Mania…Misty dives with the Monster Hammerheads of Bimini – Bahamas
programme.desc: An action packed episode as Misty swims in open water with Bimini’s famous 16-foot Hammerhead Sharks…no cage needed. Misty then takes on the Black Tip Reef sharks on Triangle Rock and searches the sunken Sapona for wildlife treasure.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The day kicks off with a one-of-a-kind “hatting ceremony” as Don Mann is crowned—then quite literally set on fire. But there’s no time to admire the flames; Ken Shamrock is waiting with another round of punishing Lion’s Den training. With Iron Man training just one day away, the pressure is at an all-time high. Contestant Landon reflects on his past Surviving Mann experience, paying tribute to the mentors who guided him—and now stepping into that role himself. The countdown to mission time begins as gear is packed, coordinates plotted, and details roll in via Red Cat Drones. With the ISR team deployed, the first phase of the mission is underway. Every contestant must be ready to deliver their cover for status in an instant—because in this game, hesitation can be the difference between success and failure.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Ryan Nolan, a hardworking, talented play-maker with integrity and intelligence to match. Unfortunately, at only 5’ 9”, his size has kept him off of many coaches' radar. Find out what strategies Coach Jesse has for Ryan to help him get scholarship offers and follow them on their shooting adventure as they compete to see who’s the fastest shot in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Richard Myers is a versatile offensive lineman with an exceptional work ethic, already college football material. The challenge? He’s from a small Indiana town and struggles to get noticed by recruiters. Join Coach Jesse and Richard as they bond over fishing and an old-fashioned Indiana demolition derby, discussing strategies to build Richard’s football future with Country Ball.

programme.title: Beyond the Close

They’ll each share game-changing strategies to take our superstars (any anyone watching) into the stratosphere.

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: In the premiere of Fortress, Sheriff Mark Lamb and co-hosts explore America’s urgent need for security—both personal and societal. They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: There are four remaining in the fight for over $500,000. Chance Kornuth is looking to add another huge cash to his tournament poker resume but is trailing the new chip leader, Tuan Phan, by only a small margin. Jon Cohen and Markus Gonsalves are also very much a part of the battle as the fight to join the WPT Champion’s Club continues in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: As we approach a dramatic finish to the Gardens Casino WPT Main Event, the tides have turned. The final four players will play until a champion is crowned with the winner banking $554,695 to go along with their name inscribed on the Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Six remaining players square off on the felt of the WPT Borgata Final Table where one player will be crowned a WPT Champion and receive over $600,000. WPT regular Veerab Zakarian is among the lucky few remaining and will take his seat with the chip lead. Brian Altman, James Anderson, Nathan Russler, Andrew Hanna, and Bin Weng will play alongside, as Vince Van Patten, and Tony Dunst provide commentary.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: The action continues at WPT Borgata. After the final table’s first elimination, five remaining players inch closer and closer to a WPT trophy. Stacks are deep and nobody is backing down.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Veerab Zakarian leads the way of the three remaining at the WPT Borgata final table. Can he hang on to secure the title of WPT Champion or will one of the shorter stacks find a way to battle back? With $674,840 on the line, lots of action is to be expected.

programme.title: S1E1 Tour
programme.desc: Pursuing the Tour de France, one of the most physically demanding sporting events in the world, covers over 3,535 kilometers in just three weeks. Every young cyclist dreams of competing in this prestigious race, but only nine riders from each team make the cut. Young cyclist Adam Yates is giving everything he has to prove he belongs on cycling’s biggest stage. 2016 Tour de France winner Chris Froome reflects on the long and grueling journey to victory, while former professional cyclists and Tour de France veterans Jens Voigt, Christian Vande Velde, and Haimar Zubeldia reveal what it truly takes to compete at the highest level.
